title: Design System: Kha Dinh — Academic Portfolio

ink-on-dark.displayName: Ink on Dark (primary text, dark mode)

display.purpose: Page-level name only. About page h1. clamp(2.25rem, 5.5vw, 3.5rem), letter-spacing -0.025em.

headline.purpose: About page section labels. 0.875rem, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.12em, ink-secondary color. Not traditional headings — metadata stamps.

title.purpose: Publication titles, project names. 0.9375rem, letter-spacing -0.005em. Workhorse heading level.

body.purpose: All prose. Newsreader with font-optical-sizing: auto. 1rem, line-height 1.7. Max ~70ch.

sidebar-mono.purpose: Contact info, location. Recursive MONO=1 — full monospace register for technical metadata.

label.purpose: Profile email detail only. One instance per page — a signature, not a system.

motion.name: ease-state-color
motion.purpose: Color-only state transitions (hover, filter active). 120ms for color, 180ms for border-color.

motion.name: ease-theme
motion.purpose: Theme switch transitions — background-color 400ms, color 300ms, border-color 300ms. Guarded by prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference.

components.name: Publication Entry
components.description: Primary content unit. Flat structured text — not a card. Title + authors + venue in a column, 1px divider top.
components.html:
Hardware-Assisted Compartmentalization Models
Kha Dinh Duy, Hojoon Lee
ACM CCS 2023Distinguished Paper
components.css: .ds-pub-entry { padding: 14px 0; border-top: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.003 264); font-family: 'Newsreader', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 300; } .ds-pub-title { font-family: 'Recursive', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variation-settings: 'MONO' 0.5, 'CASL' 0, 'slnt' 0; font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: oklch(5% 0.004 264); margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-pub-title-link { color: oklch(5% 0.004 264); text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(46% 0.27 264 / 0.25); transition: color 120ms, border-bottom-color 180ms; } .ds-pub-title-link:hover { color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); border-bottom-color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); } .ds-pub-title-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46% 0.27 264); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-pub-authors { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(48% 0.002 264); margin-bottom: 3px; } .ds-pub-authors em { font-style: normal; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(5% 0.004 264); } .ds-pub-authors a { color: oklch(48% 0.002 264); text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(46% 0.27 264 / 0.35); transition: border-bottom-color 180ms; } .ds-pub-authors a:hover { border-bottom-color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); } .ds-pub-venue-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 3px; } .ds-pub-venue { font-family: 'Recursive', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variation-settings: 'MONO' 0.5, 'CASL' 0, 'slnt' 0; font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(48% 0.002 264); } .ds-pub-award { font-family: 'Recursive', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variation-settings: 'MONO' 0.5, 'CASL' 0, 'slnt' 0; font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); border: 1px solid oklch(46% 0.27 264); padding: 2px 8px; }

components.name: Publication Filter Button
components.description: Filter pill above publication list. Inactive: ink-secondary + divider border. Active: reference-blue + reference-blue border.
components.css: .ds-filter-bar { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .ds-filter-btn { font-family: 'Recursive', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variation-settings: 'MONO' 0.5, 'CASL' 0, 'slnt' 0; font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: oklch(48% 0.002 264); background: none; border: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.003 264); border-radius: 0; padding: 3px 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 120ms, border-color 180ms; } .ds-filter-btn:hover { color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); border-color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); } .ds-filter-active { color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); border-color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); } .ds-filter-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46% 0.27 264); outline-offset: 2px; color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); }

components.name: Topic Tag
components.description: Inline topic chip in pub entries and about page bio. Clicking redirects to /publications/?topic=... or filters in-place.
components.css: .ds-topic-tag { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Recursive', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variation-settings: 'MONO' 0.5, 'CASL' 0, 'slnt' 0; font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: oklch(48% 0.002 264); border: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.003 264); padding: 1px 7px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 120ms, border-color 180ms; } .ds-topic-tag:hover { color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); border-color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); } .ds-topic-tag:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46% 0.27 264); outline-offset: 2px; color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Top nav item. Recursive weight 300. Color shift on active/hover, no background fill.
components.html: aboutpublicationscv
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 24px; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Recursive', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variation-settings: 'MONO' 0.5, 'CASL' 0, 'slnt' 0; font-weight: 300; font-size: 1rem; color: oklch(5% 0.004 264); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); } .ds-nav-active { color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46% 0.27 264); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Section Stamp
components.description: About page h2 — small uppercase label with divider bottom. Not a traditional heading: subordinate to content beneath.
components.css: .ds-section-stamp { font-family: 'Recursive', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variation-settings: 'MONO' 0.5, 'CASL' 0, 'slnt' 0; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(48% 0.002 264); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.003 264); border-top: none; padding-bottom: 10px; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 16px; }

components.name: Flat List Item
components.description: Awards and community service entries. 2-column CSS grid: year + text. Same structural logic as publication entries.
components.html: • 2023Distinguished Paper Award, ACM CCS
components.css: .ds-flat-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0 0 48px; } .ds-flat-item { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 44px 1fr; gap: 20px; padding: 12px 0; border-top: 1px solid oklch(91% 0.003 264); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-flat-item:first-child { border-top: none; } .ds-flat-year { font-family: 'Recursive', system-ui, sans-serif; font-variation-settings: 'MONO' 0.5, 'CASL' 0, 'slnt' 0; font-weight: 300; font-size: 0.75rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: oklch(48% 0.002 264); padding-top: 3px; } .ds-flat-text { font-family: 'Newsreader', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 300; color: oklch(5% 0.004 264); } .ds-flat-text a { color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); text-decoration: none; } .ds-flat-text a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

components.name: Inline Link
components.description: Body text link in Newsreader. Reference Blue, underline on hover only.
components.html: Research on software compartmentalization in constrained environments.
components.css: .ds-body { font-family: 'Newsreader', Georgia, serif; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-weight: 300; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: oklch(5% 0.004 264); } .ds-link { color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); text-decoration: none; } .ds-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(46% 0.27 264); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Profile Label (Audiowide)
components.description: Audiowide for profile email detail. One instance per page — signature, not system.
components.css: .ds-profile-label { font-family: 'Audiowide', monospace; font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: oklch(48% 0.002 264); text-decoration: none; } .ds-profile-label:hover { color: oklch(46% 0.27 264); }

narrative.overview:
System built like well-authored academic paper: typography does heavy lifting, structure immediately legible, nothing competes with argument. Recursive carries headings — weight 300, MONO=0.5, CASL=0, no decorative flourish. Newsreader handles body: optical-size serif reads like printed editorial at every size. Two fonts constitute the entire visual identity. Color, spacing, component shape exist only to support them.

Color disciplined to single accent: Reference Blue oklch(46% 0.27 264). Appears on links, citations, interactive states — never decoration. Rarity is the point. Blue link in sea of black Newsreader text signals meaning like blue hyperlink in research PDF — precise, functional, expected.

System explicitly rejects: generic al-folio defaults (white pages, teal accents, uniform card grids), flashy portfolio theatrics (gradient heroes, scroll animations, floating elements), corporate/LinkedIn register (achievement bullets, navy-and-gold safety). Goal: site feels built by the person who designed the compartmentalization model, not someone who downloaded a theme.
keyCharacteristics: Typography-led: Recursive / Newsreader pairing is the signature, not the accent color
Flat surfaces: no shadow vocabulary, no depth theater
Accent restraint: Reference Blue at ≤10% surface coverage
800px max-width: column width chosen for reading, not filling a screen
Dual-theme first: both light and dark modes designed intentionally
Axis-locked: Recursive always set with font-variation-settings: MONO 0.5, CASL 0, slnt 0

rules.name: The Reference Rule
rules.body: Reference Blue on interactive elements only. No colored section headings, no accent borders, no decorative usage. Eye lands on blue = link or citation. Diluting this signal anywhere dilutes it everywhere.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No raw oklch(0% 0 0) or oklch(100% 0 0). Every neutral is tinted toward hue 264 with chroma >= 0.002. The tint creates visual coherence that untinted black and white cannot.

rules.name: The Weight Floor Rule
rules.body: Recursive at weight 300 only for display and headings. Weight 400+ collapses contrast between headings and body. Emphasis within heading: use size, not weight.

rules.name: The Optical Size Rule
rules.body: Newsreader is an optical-size font. Always load with font-optical-sizing: auto. Without it, body text looks too heavy and captions look wrong.

rules.name: The Axis Lock Rule
rules.body: Recursive must always set font-variation-settings: MONO 0.5, CASL 0, slnt 0. Exception: sidebar mono context uses MONO=1. At MONO=0 (browser default), Recursive is indistinguishable from generic geometric sans — loses all character.

rules.name: The Global Lock
rules.body: _typography.scss sets font-variation-settings: MONO 0.5, CASL 0, slnt 0 on * globally. Newsreader silently ignores unknown axes. Never remove this global rule.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces flat at rest. No hover shadows, no float effects. If an element needs to signal interactivity, use color (Reference Blue) or underline, not elevation.

rules.name: The Anti-Card Rule
rules.body: Publication lists, project lists, and news items are not cards. They are structured text. No border-radius + box-shadow + background-color on list entries.

dos: Do use Recursive weight 300 with font-variation-settings: MONO 0.5, CASL 0, slnt 0 for all headings.
Do use MONO=1 for sidebar contact info and venue abbreviation badge text — full monospace register signals metadata.
Do limit Reference Blue to interactive states: links, citations, nav active, focus rings, filter active, tag hover.
Do use thin 1px dividers to separate list entries — structure via spacing and line, not card borders.
Do set font-optical-sizing: auto on Newsreader at every size.
Do keep max-width at 800px. Body line length stays 65–75ch.
Do treat Audiowide as signature detail: one instance per page (profile email).
Do support dark mode as first-class design variant. Test both.
Do tint all neutrals toward hue 264 — even backgrounds and text.
Do use color-mix(in oklch, ...) for tinted state backgrounds. Stays on-hue under theme switch.
Do guard all non-essential transitions with @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference).
donts: Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on any element.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use Reference Blue as a section heading color, background fill, or decorative element.
Don't use cards for publication lists, project lists, or news items.
Don't add scroll-driven animations, hero entrance effects, or floating UI elements.
Don't use generic al-folio defaults without intentional override.
Don't use Audiowide for anything other than profile email detail.
Don't use Recursive without font-variation-settings: MONO 0.5, CASL 0.
Don't use Recursive at weight 400+ in headings.
Don't design for the LinkedIn register.
Don't use IBM Plex Sans. Personal negative association — prohibited.
Don't use raw oklch(0% 0 0) or oklch(100% 0 0) for text or background. Always tint toward hue 264.
